_meta.description: Key values section reference input nodes. These 5 inputs are injected from the Reference model via the REF_OUTPUT_TO_TARGET_INPUT mapping pattern. They enable the S01 dashboard KPI comparisons between Target and Reference models.

instances.label: Reference Total Energy
instances.note: Reference model's total energy consumption. Used in dashboard energy comparison KPIs.

instances.label: Reference Emissions Subtotal
instances.note: Reference model's emissions subtotal. Used in dashboard emissions comparison KPIs.

instances.label: Reference Floor Area
instances.note: Reference model's conditioned floor area. Default 1 (not 0) to avoid division by zero in per-area calculations.

instances.label: Reference Typology Embodied Carbon
instances.note: Reference model's typology embodied carbon intensity. Used in embodied carbon comparison.

instances.label: Reference Service Life
instances.note: Reference model's building service life. Used in lifetime emissions calculations.

signature.inputs: These ARE the inputs (registered via graph.registerInput in KeyValuesNodes.js). Populated by REF_OUTPUT_TO_TARGET_INPUT mapping.
signature.output: Values stored in Target model's MultiModelState, consumed by dashboard KPI comparison nodes

invariants.description: Prevents division by zero in per-area intensity calculations

behavior.condition: Reference model computes and REF_OUTPUT_TO_TARGET_INPUT copies values
behavior.output: Target model recomputes KPI comparison nodes using reference values
behavior.note: Enables dashboard to show target vs reference side by side

edgeCases.handling: Per-area calculations return inflated values until actual area is set
edgeCases.rationale: Better than division by zero; typically populated immediately on model init

tests.name: Default reference floor area is 1 not 0
